title: rubus rivularis subsp. renifrons
intro: Rubus rivularis subsp. renifrons, also known as the Mountain Raspberry, is a subspecies of bramble that is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The Mountain Raspberry has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and has also been used as a natural remedy for skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the Mountain Raspberry can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
